title: Secrets of the Guild
description: Four ingredient–sign pairs form a valid encyclopedia article. All the clue types are in play — deduce which aspect colour they share.

hints.text: For each colour R/G/B, check whether all four ingredient–sign pairs (ingredient 1 -, ingredient 2 -, ingredient 6 +, ingredient 8 +) hold across the remaining worlds.
Eliminate any colour where at least one remaining world disagrees. Only one colour will survive.
The answer is G (Green): every remaining world maps all four entries onto the Green aspect.
